nodes.itemHTML: • Flask-Adminstars4.7k - Functional admin panel that provides a user interface for managing data based on your models.
• Eve - RESTful API framework designed for human beings.
• Flask-Classful - Adds support for class-based views for setting up RESTful API route endpoints.
• Flask-MongoReststars513 - RESTful API framework wrapped around MongoEngine.
• Flask-RESTful - Quickly build RESTful APIs.
• Connexion - Open source, OpenAPI-based, REST framework built on top of Flask.
• Flask-Rebarstars169 - Combines Flask, marshmallow, and OpenAPI for robust REST services.
• Flask-RESTX - Community-driven fork of Flask-RESTPlus that makes it easy to build and document RESTful APIs with Flask.
• Flask-APISpec - Auto-documenting REST APIs.

• SAFRS: Python OpenAPI & JSON:API Frameworkstars268 - SAFRS, which is an acronym for SqlAlchemy Flask-Restful Swagger, is meant to help developers create self-documenting JSON APIs for SQLAlchemy database objects and relationships.

nodes.itemHTML: • Flask-User - Account management, authentication, authorization.
• Flask-JWT - Basic support for working with JWTs.
• Flask-JWT-Extended - Advanced support for working with JWTs.
• Flask-JWT-Routerstars43 - Adds authorized routes to a Flask app.
• Flask-Praetorian - Authentication and authorization for Flask APIs.
• Authlib - Library for building OAuth and OpenID clients and servers.
• Authomaticstars963 - Framework agnostic library for Python web applications that simplifies authentication and authorization of users via OAuth and OpenID.
• Flask-Dancestars822 - OAuth support via OAuthLib.
• Flask-Caching - Caching support.
• Flask-Marshmallow - Thin integration layer for Flask and marshmallow (an object serialization /deserialization library) that adds additional features to marshmallow.
• Flask-Pydanticstars109 - Pydanticstars6.3k support.
• Flask-Peewee - Support for Peewee, an ORM and database migration tool.
• Flask-Pony - Support for Pony ORM.
• Flask-SQLAlchemy - Support for SQLAlchemy, a SQL toolkit and ORM.
• Flask-MongoEngine - Bridges Flask and MongoEngine for working with MongoDB.
• Flask-PyMongo - Bridges Flask and PyMongo for working with MongoDB.
• Flask-Alembic - Configurable Alembic migration environment around a Flask-SQLAlchemy database for handling database migrations.
• Flask-Excelstars227 - Uses pyexcelstars917 to read, manipulate, and write data in different Excel formats: csv, ods, xls, xlsx and xlsm.
• Flask-DebugToolbar - Port of Django's debug toolbar for Flask.
• Flask-Profilerstars639 - Endpoint analyzer/profiler.
• Flask-Fixturesstars58 - Create database fixtures from JSON or YAML.
• Mixer - Object generation tool.
• Rollbar - Flask error logging with Rollbar.
• Airbrake - Airbrake Flask integration.
• Elastic APM Agent - Elastic APM Flask integration.
• Flask Monitoring Dashboard - Dashboard for automatic monitoring of Flask web-services.
• Sentry Python SDK - Sentry SDK Flask integration.
• Flask-OpenTracingstars119 - OpenTracing instrumentation.
• Flask-Testing - Unittest extensions.
• Pytest-Flaskstars364 - Pytest support for testing Flask applications.
• Flask-Mail - Provides simple email sending capabilities.
• Flask-WTF - Integrates Flask with WTForms (provides CSRF protection as well).
• flask-msearchstars169 - Full-text search.
• Flask-WhooshAlchemy3stars21 - Full-text search + Whoosh indexing capabilities for Flask-SQLAlchemy.
• SQLAlchemy-Searchable - Provides full-text search capabilities for SQLAlchemy models.
• Flask-Bcrypt - Provides bcrypt hashing utilities.
• Flask-CORS - Cross Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) handling.
• Flask-SeaSurfstars167 - Cross-site request forgery (CSRF) prevention.
• Flask-Talismanstars750 - HTTPS and security headers.
• Celery - The most commonly used Python library for handling asynchronous tasks and scheduling.
• Dramatiq - Fast and reliable alternative to Celery.
• Flask-RQstars190 - RQ (Redis Queue) integration.
• Huey - Redis-based task queue that aims to provide a simple, yet flexible framework for executing tasks.
• Flask-Babelstars362 - Support for internationalization (i18n) and localization (l10n).
• Flask-File-Uploadstars118 - Easy file uploads.
• Flask-FlatPages - Provides flat static pages based on text files.
• Frozen-Flaskstars684 - Freezes a Flask application into a set of static files.
• Flask-GraphQLstars1.2k - GraphQL support.
• Flask-Injectorstars222 - Adds support for dependency injection.
• Flask-Limiter - Rate limiting features to Flask routes.
• Flask-Momentstars325 - Moment.js date and time formatting helpers for Jinja2 templates.
• Flask-Paginate - Pagination support.
• Flask-Sitemap - Sitemap generation.
• Flask-SocketIO - Socket.IO integration.
• Project Website - Official Flask website.
• Full Stack Python's Flask Page - Explanation of Flask philosophy and links to other resources and tutorials.
• Miguel Grinberg's Blog - Multiple Flask-specific tutorials.
• Nick Janetakis's Blog - Flask Tips, Tricks and Tutorials.
• Patrick Kennedy's Blog - Numerous tutorials on learning Python web application development with Flask.
• RealPython - Many high-quality tutorials on Flask.
• TestDriven.io - Up-to-date tutorials on Flask.
• Discord - Pallets Projects community on Discord (use the #get-help channel for Flask support).
• IRC Channel - Chat with other Flask users on IRC channel #pocoo on FreeNode.
• Mailing List - General discussion of Flask and the Pallets projects (flask@python.org).
• Reddit - Flask subreddit.
• Stack Overflow - Questions tagged flask.
• Twitter - For official announcements on updates, security fixes, etc.
• FlaskCon - Community driven Flask event intended for speakers and attendees all over the world to participate in technical and evangelical sessions related to Flask.
• Flask Conf Brazil - Conference for the developers and users of Flask.
• PyCon US - The largest annual gathering for the community using and developing the open-source Python programming language.
• PyCon Australia - National conference organized for the Python Programming Community.
• Euro Python - The largest Python conference in Europe.
• PyCon - Complete listing of all PyCons globally.
• Flask - 40+ groups in 20 countries.
• Python Web Development - 600+ groups in 81 countries.
• Python - 2,400+ groups in 100 countries.
• TalkPython - The leading Python podcast with several episodes on Flask.
• Podcast Init - A popular Python podcast that features Flask guests on occasion.
• Python Bytes - Another Python podcast that discusses Flask from time to time.
• Full Stack Python's Best Python Podcasts Page - A list of active Python-specific podcasts.
• Flask Mega-Tutorial - Overarching tutorial for Python beginner and intermediate developers that teaches web development with the Flask framework.
• Flaskr TDDstars2k - Intro to Flask, Test-Driven Development (TDD), and JavaScript.
• Make a Web App Using Python & Flask! - Creating a Python Website from the Bottom Up.
• Developing Web Applications with Python and Flask - This course focuses on teaching the fundamentals of Flask by building and testing a web application using Test-Driven Development (TDD).
• Test-Driven Development with Python, Flask, and Docker - Learn how to build, test, and deploy a production-grade microservice powered by Python, Flask, and Docker.
• Authentication with Flask, React, and Docker - Learn how to add authentication to a Flask and React microservice!.
• Deploying a Flask and React Microservice to AWS ECS - Learn how to deploy microservices to Amazon ECS powered by Flask, React, and Docker.
• Build a SAAS App with Flask - Learn to build web applications with Flask and Docker.
• Full Stack Foundations - Build a data-driven web app with Python.
• Designing RESTful APIs - Build and Secure a backend API server.
• Flask Web Development - Learn the framework from the ground up by developing, step-by-step, a real-world project.
• Real Python - Learn Python programming, by example.
• Explore Flask - Best practices and patterns for developing web applications with Flask.
• cookiecutter-flaskstars3.7k - With Bootstrap 4, asset bundling annd minification with webpack, starter templates, and registration/authentication.
• Cookiecutter Flask Skeletonstars44 - Flask starter project for Cookiecutterstars14.4k.
• gae-init - For starting new applications on Google App Engine.
• Flask-AppBuilderstars3.3k - Simple and rapid application development framework that includes detailed security, auto CRUD generation for your models, Google charts, and much more.
• flask-base - Includes SQLAlchemy, Redis, User Authentication, and more.
• Flask-Bootstrapstars197 - Integrated SQLAlchemy, authentication, and Bootstrap frontend.
• uwsgi-nginx-flask-dockerstars2.4k - Docker image with uWSGI and Nginx for Flask applications in Python running in a single container.
• React-Redux-Flaskstars1.4k - Boilerplate application for a Flask JWT Backend and a React/Redux Front-End with Material UI.
• Flask-Scaffoldstars854 - Prototype Database driven Web apps in Angular 6, Bootstrap 4 and REST API's with Flask.
• Flask-VueJSstars29 - Connect Flask application with VueJS.
• ActorCloudstars142 - Open-source IoT Platform.
• Busy Beaverstars64 - Chicago Python's Community Engagement Slack bot.
• FlaskBBstars2k - Classic forum software.
• Indicostars1.2k - Feature-rich event management system, made at CERN.
• Quokka CMS - The happiest CMS in the world.
• PythonBuddystars230 - Online Python Editor with live syntax checking and execution.
• Redashstars18.7k - Designed to enable anyone, regardless of the level of technical sophistication, to harness the power of data big and small.
• SkyLinesstars320 - Live tracking, flight database, and competition framework.
• Security Monkeystars4.2k - Monitors AWS, GCP, OpenStack, and GitHub orgs for assets and their changes over time.
• SecureDropstars3k - Open-source whistleblower submission system that media organizations can use to securely accept documents from, and communicate with anonymous sources.
• SimpleLoginstars1.2k - Protect your online identity with email alias.
• sr.ht - Git hosting service (check out Why I chose Flask to build sr.ht's mini-services as well).
• Timesketchstars1.6k - Collaborative forensic timeline analysis.
• Mixpanel - Product analytics and dashboards.
• Heap - Product analytics API for web and mobile, captures all events.
• Auth0 - Authentication & authorization as a service.
• Okta - Embeddable authentication with SSO.
• LoginRadius - Managed user authentication service with SSO.
• Codacy - Automatic code quality checks.
• Netlify - Deploy JAMStack (mainly Gatsby) via CLI.
• Heroku - Deploy via CLI to scalable servers.

• Codota - AI code completions for your IDE.
    • TabNine - Deep learning completion (part of codota).
• imgix - Transforms, optimizes, and cache images.
• Algolia - Search as a service and full suite of search APIs.
• Swiftype - Search as a service (crawlers and React ready).
• Websolr - Open-source and hosted search with Solr.
• Percy - Continuous visual testing.
• lazydockerstars17.7k - The lazier way to manage everything docker. A simple terminal UI for both docker and docker-compose, written in Go with the gocui library. By @jesseduffield
• senstars849 - 💀 Terminal user interface for docker engine, by @TomasTomecek
• captainstars172 - Easily start and stop docker compose projects from any directory. By @jenssegers
• dockersqlstars113 - A command line interface to query Docker using SQL by @crosbymichael
• ns-enterstars2.5k - 💀 no more ssh, enter name spaces of container by @jpetazzo
• docker-sshstars573 - SSH Server for Docker containers ~ Because every container should be accessible. By @jeroenpeeters
• dockercraftstars6.3k - Docker + Minecraft = Dockercraft by @docker
• dockerfile-modestars415 An emacs mode for handling Dockerfiles by @spotify
• MultiDockerstars27 - Create a secure multi-user Docker machine, where each user is segregated into an indepentent container.
• Powerline-Dockerstars58 - A Powerline segment for showing the status of Docker containers by @adrianmo
• Image Processing and Analysis - Stan Birchfield 2018
• commonlisp-vscode - an extension to support syntax highlight, auto completion, documentation on hover, go to definition, compile & load file, REPL. It is On GitHubstars29.
• strict-paredit-vscode - structural editing and navigation like Emacs.
• smokestars144 - File-based HTTP mock server with recording abilities.
• testcontainers-nodestars385 - Provides lightweight, throwaway instances of common databases, Selenium web browsers, or anything else that can run in a Docker container.
• nut.jsstars342 - Cross-platform native GUI automation / testing framework with image matching capabilities which integrates with Jest.
• 🎨🔧💼 Colorkrakenstars7 - Color shades generator for Tailwind CSS.
• 🧩 Windstrap - Tailwind CSS with Bootstrap JS.
• Awesome Haskell Videosstars22 - Curated list of Haskell talks and tutorials
• vue-genesisstars385 - 🔥Micro front end, micro service and lightweight solution based on Vue SSR🔥
• Atheris - Coverage-guided Python fuzzing engine based off of libFuzzer that supports fuzzing of Python code but also native extensions written for CPython.
• Kube Jobs - Hand-picked and curated Kubernetes jobs.
• Pontoon - Various Mozilla localization projects.
